setup:
.
The EQALIS Advisor for monitoring app includes useful pre-built searches and alerts to help maintain your Splunk implementation. It includes a traffic-light count of the number of license violations, a scheduled search to look for new incremental license violations (and optionally send an alert email), a graph showing the percentage of license usage calculated daily for the last 7 days, a count of the number of forwarders previously forwarding data but that have not forwarded any data in the last 24 hours and a table showing the details for those missing forwarders. If you are using deployment server it reports on servers that have stopped checking in and which apps have been deployed recently. The app ensures your deployment is functioning just the way you planned it.
E-Mail text
Enable bool
Submitting this form can take a long time. Please be patient and wait for it to complete before navigating away from this page.
